pageContext.name: The Bride of Frankenstein Variant
pageContext.description: You stay. We belong dead.   Sideshow and Vice Press present The Bride of Frankenstein Variant Fine Art Lithograph by Greg Staples!  This limited edition 24 X 36 unframed offset lithograph comes printed on 300gsm archival paper.  A must-have for fans of Fine Art and Universal Monsters!
